name: anthocyanin

name: passion fruit peel
charactaristic: Passion fruit peel extract has great potential as a natural antimicrobial agent due to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins that are effective against bacteria, fungi, and viruses. This potential can be utilized in various applications, ranging from edible food wrap to extend the shelf life of food to use in health products. In addition, utilizing extracts from passion fruit peel waste supports the principle of sustainability by utilizing waste into high-value products, reduce environmental impacts, and supporting a circular economy.

name: Rutin
